notes: userId is optional and omitted in all cases so the wrapper skips profile lookup and Firestore/Storage persistence. stops[].name is EXCLUDED from script checks: it is a proper-noun place name the model may keep in Latin script (must also match the googleEarthUrl search slug). stops[].googleEarthUrl is a URL (validated as https://earth.google.com/web/search/... by virtual-field-trip-validation.ts, which the flow runs in addition to Zod). Output gradeLevel/subject are required strings but metadata — excluded. Wrapper runs extractGradeFromTopic() on topic — keep any grade mention in topic consistent with the gradeLevel field. topic max 1000 chars, language max 50 chars.
